title: No Trade Cooldown
description: Removes villager trade cooldowns — trade infinitely without waiting.
body:
# ♾️ NoTradeCooldown 

Removes villager trade cooldowns so you can trade infinitely without waiting. No more locked trades, no more restock timers — every trade is always available. 
How It Works 

In vanilla Minecraft 26.1, villager trades have a maxUses limit. Once you've traded enough times, the offer becomes "out of stock" and is permanently greyed out. The villager then needs to restock before the trade becomes available again. NoTradeCooldown intercepts the increaseUses() method on MerchantOffer and prevents the use counter from incrementing. This means trades never reach their limit and stay available forever.

## Features 

- Infinite trades — every offer stays available after every single trade
- No restock cooldown — villagers never enter a "restocking" state
- Works with data-driven trades — fully compatible with the new 26.1 trade system
- Server-side optional — works on servers without clients needing to install anything
- Lightweight — single mixin, zero config, zero overhead
     

## Compatibility 

     Minecraft: 26.1
     Mod Loader: Fabric
     Fabric Loader: 0.18.6+
     Fabric API: 0.145.1+26.1
     Java: 25+
     

## Installation 

    Install Fabric Loader  (0.18.6 or newer) 
    Download Fabric API  for 26.1 
    Drop the mod's .jar into your .minecraft/mods/ folder 
    Launch the game and trade away! 

## About 

This is a minimal, no-config mod. Drop it in and it works. No settings to tweak, no menus to configure — just infinite trades.
